summary: Iteration 70: Site-wide consistency review PASSED with minor fixes applied. Tested 12 pages for mobile responsiveness (390x844 viewport), theme consistency (gold #C9A962), dark mode (#050505), and hero visibility. Fixed blue/purple accent issues in package-builder quiz modal.

theme_consistency.gold_accent_#C9A962: Present on all tested pages - PASS
theme_consistency.blue_accents: None found on user-facing pages (brands has category-specific colors for differentiation which is expected)

issues: Category filter colors use blue/purple for differentiation - this is expected design behavior for distinguishing brand categories, not theme accent colors

fixes_applied.issue: Summary section had blue gradient bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-50 to-blue-50
fixes_applied.fix: Changed to from-gray-50 to-gray-100 with dark mode support

fixes_applied.issue: Multiple blue/purple accent classes and colors
fixes_applied.fix: Changed all blue/purple/cyan/indigo to gold (#C9A962) theme

critical_code_review_comments: H1 sizes standardized to text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl - verified at 30px on mobile which is appropriate
Hero backgrounds now have opacity-80 making images clearly visible
Dark mode uses OLED black (#050505) where specified
Gold accent (#C9A962) used consistently across all main interactive elements
Mobile container padding standardized to px-5 sm:px-8 lg:px-16

success_rate.frontend: 100% (12 pages tested, all passing after fixes)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Site-wide consistency changes verified. H1 is 30px on mobile (text-3xl). Gold accent #C9A962 used consistently. Dark mode uses #050505 OLED black. Hero backgrounds have opacity-80 for visibility. Minor fixes applied to package-builder quiz modal to remove blue accents. Brands page category colors (blue/purple for Audio/Automation/Video) are intentional for category differentiation.
